title: Verify the full cancellation flow with incentive offer acceptance
description: Test that a user attempting to cancel is shown the loss aversion gate, proceeds, accepts the discount offer, and successfully converts to a paid subscription.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the Trial Corner.
The 'First Month Discount' offer is enabled via backend configuration.

steps.description: 1. In Trial Corner, click the 'Cancel Trial' button.
2. On the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up, click the secondary action 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'.
3. On the 'Incentive' offer pop-up, click the primary action to 'Grab Offer' or 'Lock in 50% off'.
4. Complete the payment for the discounted amount.
5. Check the trial status in the Trial Corner hub.

expected_result: The payment is successful. The user's account is upgraded to a discounted first-month subscription which will start after the trial ends. The UI reflects the new subscription status.
